content.en:
Not long after, the Heavenly Crescent Saint Ancestor finally succeeded in bringing Ye Tian back.

At this time, he breathed a sigh of relief.

The will clone was killed, it was nothing, but Ye Tian must have a huge amount of resources and the Primordial Gold Bead on his body, the value of the Primordial Gold Bead was too high, even if it was a fivefold primordial ancestor of his level, he couldn't ignore it!

After all, any force needs the Primordial Gold Bead, and this is a treasure that keeps increasing the number of fivefold primordial ancestors!

"Endless Primordial Ancestor, how many Primordial Gold Beads have you obtained?"

The Heavenly Crescent Saint Ancestor asked.

"Two hundred and fifty thousand!"

Ye Tian said more than 50,000 pieces, he knew very well that the Void Tooth Holy Gate definitely wanted to trade the Primordial Gold Beads on his body, so he concealed 50,000 more Primordial Gold Beads, which was left to his relatives, otherwise after endless years, his relatives would grow to the realm of the Quadruple Primordial Ancestor, and he would not be able to become a Fivefold Primordial Ancestor without the Primordial Gold Beads, and he would not be able to get the Primordial Gold Beads.

Therefore, now that I have obtained so many primordial gold beads, I will keep a part of them directly.

"250,000 Primordial Gold Beads!!!"

The Heavenly Crescent Saint Ancestor gasped.

This is enough for twenty-five half-step fivefold ancestors to steadily become fivefold ancestors!

You must know that there are not many Fivefold Origin Ancestors in the entire Void Tooth Holy Gate, at best, there are only more than three hundred Fivefold Origin Ancestors, so it is too meaningful to have twenty-five more Fivefold Origin Ancestors!

Besides, if you really want to make reasonable use of so many primordial gold beads, more than twenty-five fivefold primordial ancestors will be born!

After all, the success rate of those Holy Sons themselves is more than 10%, and some can even be close to 20%, so they don't need 10,000 primordial gold beads.

If used rationally, more than 30 Fivefold Ancestors can be born.

"Endless Primordial Ancestor, you don't need so many Primordial Gold Beads, can you contribute the excess Primordial Gold Orbs to the Void Fang Holy Gate. Of course, the Void Tooth Holy Gate will not ask for it in vain, and the resources that you break through to the Fivefold Origin Ancestor and the Fivefold Origin Ancestor to cultivate to the peak of the Fivefold Origin Ancestor, the Void Tooth Holy Gate will do its best to provide you with the resources. Moreover, I can apply for an Primordial Treasure Talisman for you!" said the Heavenly Crescent Saint Ancestor.

"I promised!"

Ye Tian nodded.

He also knew that he couldn't refuse.

Subsequently, Ye Tian also met the Void Tooth Holy Ancestor.

"Endless Ancestor, you're very good!"

The Void Tooth Saint Ancestor exclaimed.

"Lord Sect, I'm just lucky!" Ye Tian said modestly.

"You don't need to be humble with me, you were able to snatch so many primordial gold beads, which is enough to prove your strength, I would like to know, have you comprehended the three hundred and sixty-five extreme extreme paths?" asked the Void Tooth Saint Ancestor.

Ye Tian also knew that he couldn't hide it, he was so bewitching this time, everyone would suspect it.

"Yes!" Ye Tian nodded.

Seeing that Ye Tian had admitted it, the Void Tooth Holy Ancestor couldn't help but gasp, and the Heavenly Tooth Holy Ancestor on the side was also shocked.

Although they all had speculations, they were still shocked when they really got Ye Tian's admission.

"Three hundred and sixty-five extreme extremes, it seems that you have also solidified into a natal primordial mastery technique with the Supreme Primordial Mastery Technique. The Void Tooth Saint Ancestor said.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded.

"Very good!" Void Tooth Saint Ancestor said, "Do you know what the odds of becoming a Sixfold Origin Ancestor are with three hundred and sixty-five Extreme Extreme Dao engraved on the Pagoda of Will?"

"How much?"

Ye Tian was a little curious.

"Fifty percent!" the Void Tooth Saint Ancestor said, "And the half-step sixfold ancestor who is engraved with one hundred and eight extreme extreme paths, the probability of breaking through to a sixfold origin ancestor is only one percent. This is also the reason why the Primeval Origin Boundary, the Sixfold Primordial Ancestor is so rare. A 50% chance is a high chance, and even if you fail once, you have a good chance of succeeding the second time. In other words, as long as you don't fall, you will almost definitely become a sixfold primordial ancestor in the future! We have not yet given birth to a sixfold primordial ancestor in the Upper Spirit Primordial Domain! If a sixfold primordial ancestor is born, the status of the Upper Soul Primordial Domain will not be so embarrassing!"

Immediately, the Void Tooth Saint Ancestor's voice changed, "Of course, engraved with one hundred and eight extreme extreme paths, the combat power is invincible at the same level, and it is getting stronger and stronger in the later stage, and other original ancestors can't compete at all." What you are cultivating should be the Primordial Zhou Tian Diagram, and there are only three systematic inscription techniques involving one hundred and eight extreme paths in the entire Primordial Domain, and in this area of our Upper Spirit Origin Domain, there is only the Primordial Zhou Tian Diagram. "

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded.

"Do you know how many primordial ancestors have been born in the entire primeval realm that have comprehended three hundred and sixty-five extreme extreme paths?" said the Void Fang Holy Ancestor.

"I don't know!" Ye Tian shook his head.

"Before you, there was only one!" said the Void Fang Saint Ancestor.

"Just one?"

Ye Tian was shocked.

However, when he thought of the difficulty of comprehending the three hundred and sixty-five extreme paths and condensing the three hundred and sixty-five layers of the Will Pagoda, he felt normal.

The three hundred and sixty-five layers of the Extreme Extreme Dao, with the essence of the Fivefold Holy Gate, if you forcibly condense it, you can still condense it, but if you want to comprehend the three hundred and sixty-five extreme extreme paths.

If you don't have so many Extreme Dao Ancestors, you can't do this at all, it's almost impossible.

"Therefore, in the future, you will say that you have comprehended the three hundred and sixty extreme extreme paths, don't say that you have comprehended the three hundred and sixty-five extreme extreme paths. The Void Tooth Saint Ancestor said.

"Sect Master, I understand! But in this case, the outside world doesn't believe it, right? There is no Supreme Primordial Control Technique, and there is a Supreme Primordial Mastery Technique, the difference in strength is not the same level!"

Ye Tian said.

"Don't worry, I'll say that you have an Primordial Treasure on your body that can amplify the Primordial Control Technique!" said the Void Tooth Saint Ancestor and took out a Primordial Treasure, "This is the Primordial Treasure Infinite Golden Light Pagoda, with the cultivation of the Quadruple Primordial Ancestor, it can barely be refined. Of course, it's not used to amplify primordial mastery, it's just for defense. However, if you say that it can amplify the Primordial Mastery Technique, it can increase the Primordial Mastery Technique! You refine it, and then find an occasional opportunity to expose it, plus my statement, the other Primordial Ancestors are skeptical. The day you step into the Sixfold Ancestor, even if it's really exposed, it doesn't matter. "

"Thank you, Master!"

Ye Tian thanked.

Immediately, Ye Tian took over this Primordial Supreme Treasure Infinite Golden Light Pagoda, and he also handed over the 240,000 Primordial Golden Orbs to the Void Tooth Holy Ancestor.

"This is the inheritance of becoming a five-fold ancestor, give it to you!"

Before leaving, the Void Tooth Holy Ancestor threw over a inheritance ball and said.

Ye Tian took it and quickly accepted this inheritance.

At this time, he knew how to become a fivefold ancestor.

The Pagoda of Will's tempering is above nine times, which is only the first condition, and it is the easiest condition.
